patterns: Aggregator SEO blogs (VO3 AI Blog, AI Tool Analysis) frequently cited outdated launch dates as current news -- always verify with original source or official blog. Runway Gen-4 was falsely surfaced as a May 2026 launch; original was March 2025.
Chinese AI video models are a major ongoing beat: HappyHorse (Alibaba), Wan (Alibaba), Kling (Kuaishou), Seedance (ByteDance). Search for these by name each run.
OpenAI is in a strategic pivot away from consumer products toward enterprise -- Sora shutdown is the headline example. Watch for further product sunsets.
AI music is a rich category this week: ElevenMusic launch, Taylor Swift trademark, consumer preference study all landed in the same week. These cluster well together.
Direct page fetches mostly return 403. WebSearch result summaries are the primary data source -- cross-reference claims across at least two search result snippets before writing.
Stories that fall just outside the 14-day window (like exec exits on April 17) can be included as context within a story anchored to an in-window event.
DALL-E API shutdown May 12 is a countdown hook -- good for a follow-up story if the deprecation creates disruption.
Funny/weird category is hardest to find with web search. Next run: search explicitly for specific viral moments or AI fails that have published articles, not listicles.
feedback: Initial run. No feedback yet. Focus on finding strong stories across all categories. Prioritize AI video and AI art. Include at least one funny/weird story per run if possible.
